## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Evidence and Sources

List primary sources used to verify metadata or claims.

## Classification Rationale

If taxonomy metadata changes, explain the decision against the repository criteria.

## Checklist

- [ ] I verified factual metadata against reliable sources.
- [ ] I did not add fabricated citations, links, or results.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_metadata.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/generate_paper_tables.py` when paper data changed.
- [ ] I checked affected Markdown links.
- [ ] I documented unresolved information as `TODO`.
